sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 70:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 70:1
items.html: Because that coupling which is made on the phases of records called ZON of the vessel of Keter was at nearly the level of Keter. Hence, they could only come down and clothe in their designated vessel, which is the vessel of Keter. However, after they were refined, and their level was diminished to the level of the other Sefirot, they descended and clothed in them to that extent. (Inner Light, Item‎ 35)
